dialogueChunks.intro: The initial investigation raised more questions than answers. {quest_focus} is connected to something larger, and the clues point toward {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} have been guarding a second site near {location}. Whatever {quest_threat} is, they seem to understand it better than we do. We need those {quest_item} fragments to piece together the pattern.
dialogueChunks.outro: Gather what you can from the area and drive off the {enemy_type} guarding it. Every piece of evidence brings us closer to understanding.

playerResponses.text: I'll dig deeper into this mystery.
The answers are out there somewhere.

dialogueChunks.intro: We're not the only ones investigating {quest_focus}. {target_npc} reports that outsiders have been asking questions about the same sites, and they don't seem friendly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: These strangers want {quest_stakes} for themselves, and they've already ransacked one site near {location_hint}. If we don't act quickly, every trace of {quest_focus} will vanish into their hands.
dialogueChunks.outro: Reach the remaining site before they do. Recover what you can and find out who these people are working for.

playerResponses.text: Who else would want this knowledge?

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} studied the evidence you brought back and turned grim. {quest_focus} isn't just a curiosity: it's a warning.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The markings describe something that happened here before, something involving {quest_threat}. If the pattern repeats, {quest_stakes} could be at risk. The {enemy_type} near {location} may be drawn by the same force.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need more information, but the remaining clues are in dangerous territory. Push into the area near {location_hint} and bring back anything that confirms the warning.

playerResponses.text: If it's a warning, we need to heed it.
